# Starter Embedded Examples

## GPIO blink

```c
// code/gpio_blink.c
#include <stdint.h>

volatile uint32_t * const GPIO_OUT = (uint32_t *)0x50000000;

void blink_once(void) {
    *GPIO_OUT ^= (1u << 25);
}
```

## UART transmit

```c
// code/uart_tx.c
#include <stddef.h>
#include <stdint.h>

void uart_send_byte(uint8_t b);

void uart_send_buffer(const uint8_t *buf, size_t len) {
    for (size_t i = 0; i < len; ++i) {
        uart_send_byte(buf[i]);
    }
}
```

## Interrupt handler

```c
// code/isr_timer.c
#include <stdint.h>

volatile uint32_t tick_count;

void TIM0_IRQHandler(void) {
    tick_count++;
}
```
